title: dioscorea guerrerensis
intro: Dioscorea guerrerensis is a species of yam, belonging to the genus Dioscorea, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the production of cortisol, a hormone that helps regulate stress response. The health benefits of Dioscorea guerrerensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Dioscorea guerrerensis is often used in herbal preparations, such as capsules, tinctures, and teas, where it is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
